title: Forgotten Faces
writer: Richard Washburn Child, Howard Estabrook, Oliver H.P. Garrett
actors: Clive Brook, Mary Brian, Olga Baclanova
plot: Clive Brook stars as "Heliotrope" Harry, a gentleman thief tossed in jail for killing his wife's lover. Before turning himself in, Harry leaves his baby girl on the doorstep of a rich, childless couple. Desperate to keep his lush ...
